title: selaginella loriai
intro: Selaginella loriai, also known as Loria's spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, a group of plants that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella loriai include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Selaginella loriai is often used in traditional medicine to create teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
